summary: Iteration 77: Sales/POS Bug Fixes - Backend (11/11 tests PASS) and Frontend verified. Fixed 3 bugs: 1) Quantity decimal input now supports 0.5 (frontend setCartQty handles intermediate states), 2) Split payments now trigger QR code for receipt upload (same as digital), 3) E-Payment Details section in Sales History works correctly with upload endpoint fix. Found and fixed critical frontend API route mismatch (/uploads/invoice/{id} → /uploads/record/invoice/{id}) and added 'invoice' to REVIEWABLE_COLLECTIONS in backend.

BUG_FIX_1_QUANTITY_DECIMAL.description: Typing '0.' or '0.5' in quantity field should NOT delete the product
details: setCartQty function (line 482-491) correctly handles intermediate decimal input
Intermediate states ('0.', '1.', '.5', '') stored as _qtyStr without removing product
onBlur only removes product when final parsed value is 0
Frontend fix was already in place

BUG_FIX_2_SPLIT_PAYMENT_QR.description: Split payment should show receipt upload QR after sale (same as digital)
details: Both payment types now trigger QR generation for receipt upload
Split payment form shows hint at line 1685-1687: 'After sale: QR code will appear'

BUG_FIX_3_EPAYMENT_VERIFICATION.description: E-payment details and verification in Sales History
details: GET /api/invoices/history/by-date returns all required fields: fund_source, digital_platform, digital_ref_number, receipt_review_status
Added 'invoice' to REVIEWABLE_COLLECTIONS in backend uploads.py
E-Payment Details section shows platform, ref#, sender, cash/digital amounts for split
'Upload Now' link visible when no receipt uploaded
'Verify E-Payment' button now works for invoices

/app/frontend/src/pages/UnifiedSalesPage.reason: Frontend was calling wrong API route for fetching invoice receipts

/app/backend/routes/uploads.py.reason: mark-reviewed endpoint now supports invoices for e-payment verification

test_categories: History API Fields (4 tests): fund_source, digital_platform, receipt_review_status, split amounts
Uploads Endpoint (3 tests): record/invoice route, wrong route 404, sessions response
Mark-Reviewed Endpoint (2 tests): invoice type support, valid PIN verification
Code Review Verification (2 tests): setCartQty decimal handling, split payment QR trigger

ui_elements_verified: Sales History tab shows invoices with fund_source badges (Cash, Split, Credit)
Digital/Split invoices show 'needs verify' or 'verified' status
Invoice detail modal shows E-PAYMENT DETAILS section for digital/split
Platform, Ref#, Cash/Digital amounts displayed correctly
'Upload Now' link visible when no receipt uploaded
'Pending Verification' badge shown when not verified

critical_code_review_comments: Frontend API route mismatch was critical - selectInvoiceWithReceipts was calling wrong endpoint
REVIEWABLE_COLLECTIONS in uploads.py needed 'invoice' entry for verification to work
Quantity decimal handling (setCartQty) implementation is correct - uses _qtyStr for intermediate states
Split payment QR trigger already implemented correctly in processSale function
seed_data_creation: None - used existing IPIL BRANCH data with digital/split invoices
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 77 verified all 3 Sales/POS bug fixes. Bug Fix 1 (decimal quantity): setCartQty uses _qtyStr for intermediate decimal states like '0.' - product only removed on blur if final value is 0. Bug Fix 2 (split QR): processSale line 897 checks (actualPaymentType === 'digital' || actualPaymentType === 'split') to trigger QR. Bug Fix 3 (e-payment verification): Fixed critical API route mismatch in selectInvoiceWithReceipts (/uploads/invoice/{id} → /uploads/record/invoice/{id}) and added 'invoice' to REVIEWABLE_COLLECTIONS so mark-reviewed endpoint works for invoices. All backend APIs tested: history returns fund_source/digital_platform/receipt_review_status, uploads endpoint works, mark-reviewed now supports invoices.
